mapper.sql: id, user_id, channel_type, webhook_url, webhook_secret, target_name, config_hash, topic_preferences, frequency, status, source, last_push_at, last_test_at, last_push_status, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: select from tech_briefing_subscription where id = #{id} limit 1
select from tech_briefing_subscription order by create_time desc, id desc
